source: https://www.rml.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/RSG-Denver-Gold-Forum-Presentation-2025.pdf - RSG September 2025 Gold Forum Americas Presentation

assets.name: Syama Mine
assets.notes: Year1 (2025) production of 195-210 koz midpoint 202.5 koz. Years 2-5 (2026-2029) estimated at 210 koz based on guidance stating '+200koz per annum producing gold mine' and current expected future production guidance of 205-215 koz. AISC range 1700-1800 USD/oz, midpoint 1750 USD/oz. H1 2025 actual: 89.3 koz at 1972 USD/oz. All values in USD.

assets.name: Mako Mine - Stockpile Processing
assets.notes: Year1 (2025) production 80-90 koz midpoint 85 koz; guidance states 'expected gold production of 4-5koz Au per month through to end of 2027' = 48-60 koz annually, using 60 koz. Years 2-3 (2026-2027) estimated at 60 koz per annum based on monthly guidance. Years 4-5 (2028-2029) zero as stockpile processing ends 2027. AISC range 1300-1400 USD/oz, midpoint 1350 USD/oz. H1 2025 actual: 62.2 koz at 1104 USD/oz. All values in USD.

assets.name: Mako Mine - Tomboronkoto/Bantaco Satellite Deposits
assets.notes: Year1-2 (2025-2026) zero production; guidance indicates 'Progressing studies and permitting' with 'Tomboronkoto ESIA Approval' in H2 2025 and 'Finalise Tomboronkoto and Bantaco permitting' in 2026. Years 3-5 (2027-2029) estimated at 45-55 koz midpoint 50 koz based on guidance 'Targeting 5+ years of production from satellite deposits' and timeline showing mining activities commencing 2027-2028. AISC range 1400-1500 USD/oz, midpoint 1450 USD/oz. Production and AISC beyond 2026 noted as 'approximate forecasts and may change'. All values in USD.

assets.name: Doropo Project
assets.notes: Years 1-3 (2025-2027) zero production; project acquired 1 May 2025, updated DFS expected Q4 2025, construction to commence 2026, first production targeted 2028. Year 4 (2028) production Y1 of 2024 DFS schedule = 200 koz, adjusted to 115 koz based on updated guidance showing 'Doropo commissioning and ramp up' in 2028 with group production target 400+ koz (vs 275-300 current). Year 5 (2029) production Y2 of DFS schedule = 213 koz, adjusted to 154 koz for ramp-up phase. 2024 DFS: 10-year mine life, LoM average AISC 1047 USD/oz, construction cost 373 million USD. Mineral Resources updated to 4.4 Moz (28% increase). All values in USD.
